channel.title: Solaris Wireless Blog
channel.description: Institutional electronic device procurement insights from Solaris Wireless. Founded 2013, Google-approved vendor since 2016.

item.title: The Complete Guide to Institutional Device Procurement (2026)
item.description: How enterprises, MVNOs and government agencies procure electronic devices at institutional scale. TCO models, vendor selection, MDM provisioning.

item.title: Custom OS Flashing for Bulk Phones: What MVNOs and Enterprises Need to Know (2026)
item.description: Custom OS flashing loads modified Android firmware onto smartphones before shipment. Learn how MVNOs, enterprises and kiosk operators use custom OS flashing.

item.title: What Solaris Does That a Consumer Phone Retailer Cannot
item.description: Solaris Wireless supplies institutional buyers with bulk phones plus MDM enrolment, custom OS, SIM lock, compliance documentation and direct-to-employee fulfilment, capabilities consumer retailers (Best Buy, carrier stores) cannot provide.

item.title: ITAR/EAR-Compliant Device Supply: How Solaris Handles Defence Procurement
item.description: Solaris Wireless handles ITAR/EAR-controlled electronic device deployment for U.S. Government, defence agencies and allied nations with full chain-of-custody, DSP-83 documentation and 72-hour rapid response.

item.title: How to Source End-of-Life and Hard-to-Find Electronic Components (2026)
item.description: How government agencies, OEMs and enterprises source end-of-life (EOL) electronic components and discontinued devices. EOL procurement strategy.

item.title: MDM Enrollment and Bulk Device Provisioning: Enterprise Buyer's Guide (2026)
item.description: Apple Business Manager, Google Zero-Touch enrollment and bulk MDM provisioning explained for enterprise IT directors and procurement managers.

item.title: Wholesale Android Phones for MVNOs: Complete Sourcing Guide (2026)
item.description: How MVNO operators source wholesale Android phones with custom OS flashing, SIM lock provisioning, carrier branding and bulk fulfilment.

item.title: Starlink Terminal Wholesale: How Businesses and Governments Source Satellite Connectivity (2026)
item.description: How enterprises, governments and maritime operators buy Starlink terminals in bulk at wholesale pricing. Starlink Standard vs Business vs Maritime.

item.title: Starlink Business vs Maritime vs Standard: Comparison Guide for Institutional Buyers (2026)
item.description: Side-by-side comparison of Starlink Standard, Business and Maritime kits for institutional and government buyers, with pricing, throughput, mobility and SLA differences.

item.title: Bulk iPhone Supplier for Enterprise: How Solaris Wireless Ships ABM-Enrolled Devices
item.description: Solaris Wireless supplies bulk iPhones to enterprise IT teams through Apple Authorised Reseller channels with ABM auto-enrolment, AppleCare for Business and direct-to-employee fulfilment.

item.title: What Is a Google-Approved Device Vendor and Why It Matters for Institutional Buyers
item.description: A Google-approved vendor for electronic devices has passed Google's rigorous supplier qualification process. Learn what Google vendor approval means.

item.title: Federal Phone Procurement: How Solaris Wireless Supports GSA, NASPO and Direct-to-Agency Buying
item.description: Solaris Wireless supplies federal, state and local government agencies with TAA-compliant smartphones, FIPS-validated encryption, CAC/PIV configuration and direct-to-end-user fulfilment.

item.title: Zero-Touch Android Deployment: How Solaris Ships Pre-Enrolled Devices
item.description: Solaris Wireless ships bulk Android devices pre-registered in your Google Zero-Touch tenant so they auto-enrol into your MDM on first power-on. Direct-to-employee, with custom OS available.

item.title: MDM Provisioning Comparison: Apple Business Manager vs Google Zero-Touch vs Samsung Knox (2026)
item.description: Side-by-side comparison of Apple Business Manager DEP, Google Zero-Touch Enrollment and Samsung Knox Mobile Enrollment for institutional bulk device provisioning.

item.title: The Complete Guide to Institutional Mobile Device Sourcing in 2026
item.description: How government agencies, MVNOs and enterprises source smartphones at institutional scale, OEM relationships, carrier configuration, SIM-lock provisioning.

item.title: Enterprise Laptop Procurement: How to Source at Scale Without Overpaying
item.description: A practical guide to enterprise laptop procurement at scale: TCO reduction strategies, multi-OEM sourcing, configuration standardisation, MDM pre-enrolment.

item.title: IoT Hardware Supply Chains: From Smart Cameras to Industrial Sensors
item.description: Expert analysis of IoT hardware supply chain challenges, smart cameras, industrial sensors, edge computing devices and institutional procurement strategies for.

item.title: Starlink Terminal Deployment at Scale
item.description: How to source, configure and deploy Starlink terminals at institutional scale for maritime operations, remote mining sites.
